message:
feat: Enhance connectors and add semantic indexing support

Expand connector system with substantial improvements:

- Add comprehensive connector functionality for multiple agent types
- Introduce semantic indexing module for improved search relevance
- Extend indexer to support semantic analysis of session content

These changes enable better cross-agent session discovery and
more intelligent search across heterogeneous session formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
